title: Are There Hidden Bases on the Moon?
summary: A brief discussion exploring the possibility of hidden bases on the moon, ancient Atlantean survivors with advanced technology, and claims about extraterrestrial structures on the far side of the moon. The conversation touches on why China may be exploring the far side of the moon.

key_claims.claim: A base has been discovered on the back side of the moon
China went to the far side of the moon as part of a race to capture ancient technology
Extraterrestrials could have populated or made structures on the far side of the moon
Survivors of ancient Atlantis may exist among us with underwater bases or bases on the moon with advanced technology
